title: Tao Te Ching 12
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 12 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 12 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The five colors blind the eyes. The five sounds deafen the ears. The five flavors dull the palate.
